title: Yes Bank Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Yes Bank Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Yes Bank Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Yes Bank Global Group:
Yes Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
